_comment: 所有 'fn' 字段为 Python 表达式字符串。可用变量：状态变量名、params 键名、engine 字典（引擎状态快照）。clamp 格式 [lo, hi]，null 表示无界。ode_type: logistic | algebraic | first_order_lag | custom。

references.text: Restuito et al. 2018. Ventilation-Perfusion Mismatch in Canine Pneumonia.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 12.

alveolar_exudate.description: 肺泡渗出物累积量（相对值，0-1）（logistic增长）

bacterial_load.description: 细菌负荷增长（logistic增长）（自定义ODE）

fever_state.description: 发热状态（first-order lag响应）（一阶滞后）

tissue_hypoxia.description: 组织缺氧程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: Cowgill LD. Acute Kidney Injury. J Vet Intern Med 2012.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 13.

gfr_decline.description: GFR下降程度（相对值）（代数关系）

metabolic_acidosis.description: 代谢性酸中毒程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: Tidholm A et al. Canine Dilated Cardiomyopathy. J Vet Intern Med 2006.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 11.

contractility_loss.description: 收缩力丧失程度（代数关系）

ventricular_dilation.description: 心室扩张程度（一阶滞后）

fluid_retention.description: 液体潴留程度（一阶滞后）

phosphorus_poisoning.display_name: 磷化锌/磷化铝灭鼠药中毒

references.text: Gale GR et al. Zinc Phosphide Rodenticide Poisoning. Vet Hum Toxicol 1999.
Peterson ME & Talcott PA. Small Animal Toxicology, 3rd ed. Saunders, Ch 45.

myocardial_depression.description: 心肌抑制程度（代数关系）

metabolic_acidosis.description: 代谢性酸中毒程度（一阶滞后）

pain_level.description: 全身酸痛/代谢性酸中毒不适感（一阶滞后）

references.text: Orson HE et al. GDV in Dogs. JAVMA 2017.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 11.

systemic_shock.description: 全身性休克程度（一阶滞后）

arrhythmia_severity.description: 心律失常严重程度（一阶滞后）

immune_mediated_hemolytic_anemia.display_name: 免疫介导性溶血性贫血（IMHA）

references.text: Garden OA et al. Immune-mediated haemolytic anaemia in dogs. J Small Anim Pract 2009.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 15.

rbc_destruction.description: 红细胞破坏程度（一阶滞后）

compensatory_tachycardia.description: 代偿性心动过速（一阶滞后）

references.text: Hostutler RA et al. Urethral Obstruction in Cats. J Vet Intern Med 2005.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 13.

bladder_distension.description: 膀胱扩张程度（一阶滞后）

post_renal_azotemia.description: 肾后性氮质血症（一阶滞后）

hyperkalemia.description: 高钾血症程度（一阶滞后）

metabolic_acidosis.description: 代谢性酸中毒程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: Diabetic Ketoacidosis in Dogs and Cats. J Vet Intern Med 2010.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 14.

anion_gap_acidosis.description: 阴离子间隙性酸中毒（一阶滞后）

references.text: Pericardial Disease in Dogs. J Vet Cardiol 2017.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 11.

pericardial_volume.description: 心包积液量（相对值）（logistic增长）

tamponade_severity.description: 心脏填塞严重程度（代数关系）

venous_congestion.description: 静脉淤血程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: DIC in Dogs and Cats. J Vet Emerg Crit Care 2014.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 15.

coagulation_consumption.description: 凝血因子消耗程度（一阶滞后）

organ_ischemia.description: 器官缺血程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: Peterson ME. Hyperthyroidism in Cats. J Vet Intern Med 2005.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 14.

tachycardia.description: 心动过速程度（一阶滞后）

hypoadrenocorticism.display_name: 肾上腺皮质功能减退（艾迪森氏病）

references.text: Adrenal Insufficiency in Dogs. J Vet Intern Med 2010.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 14.

cortisol_deficiency.description: 皮质醇缺乏程度（代数关系）

hyperkalemia.description: 高钾血症程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: Sepsis and Septic Shock in Small Animals. J Vet Emerg Crit Care 2017.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 12.

cytokine_storm.description: 细胞因子风暴程度（一阶滞后）

capillary_leak.description: 毛细血管渗漏程度（一阶滞后）

fever_state.description: 发热程度（一阶滞后，target 跟随 cytokine_storm）

references.text: Intervertebral Disc Disease in Dogs. Vet Surg 2014.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 16.
Meningitis and Meningoencephalitis in Dogs and Cats. J Vet Intern Med 2010.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 16.

cns_inflammation.description: 中枢神经系统炎症（logistic增长）

consciousness_loss.description: 意识丧失程度（一阶滞后）

seizure_activity.description: 癫痫活动程度（一阶滞后）

pain_level.description: 脑膜刺激/头痛程度（一阶滞后，跟随 CNS 炎症）

hepatic_failure_coagulopathy.display_name: 肝功能衰竭伴凝血障碍

references.text: Canine Liver Disease and Coagulopathy. J Vet Intern Med 2014.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 10.

factor_VII_decline.description: 凝血因子VII下降（一阶滞后）

encephalopathy.description: 肝性脑病程度（一阶滞后）

references.text: Splenic Masses and Hemorrhage in Dogs. JAVMA 2017.
Nelson RW & Couto CG. Small Animal Internal Medicine, 6th ed. Mosby, Ch 11.

hypovolemic_shock.description: 低血容量性休克（一阶滞后）

compensatory_tachycardia.description: 代偿性心动过速（一阶滞后）

pain_level.description: 急性腹痛程度（一阶滞后，跟随脾出血量）

anemia_severity.fn: min(1.0, eop_deficiency * 0.4 + gi_blood_loss * 0.2 + pth_elevation * 0.15 + inflammation * 0.1 + iron_loss * 0.15)

references.text: King LG et al. Anemia of chronic renal failure in dogs. J Vet Intern Med 1992.
Borin-Crivellenti S et al. Hematologic and biochemical variables in dogs with CKD. AJVR 2023.
Sannamwong N et al. Urinary iron and transferrin loss in dogs with CKD. Vet World 2023.
Petrites-Murphy MB et al. Role of PTH in renal anemia in dogs. AJVR 1989.

eop_deficiency.description: EPO 缺乏（肾单位损失 >40% 时开始）

anemia_severity.formula: anemia_severity = eop_deficiency×0.4 + gi_blood_loss×0.2 + pth_elevation×0.15 + inflammation×0.1 + iron_loss×0.15
anemia_severity.description: 贫血严重程度（多因素加权）

references.text: Vizi Z et al. Elevated hepcidin in dogs with portosystemic shunt. Res Vet Sci 2025.
Rothuizen J et al. Bilirubin kinetics in dogs with hepatobiliary disease. J Hepatol 1992.
Simpson KW et al. Iron status in dogs with portosystemic vascular anomalies. JVIM 1997.
Couture Y et al. Hematologic variables in dogs with portosystemic shunts. JVIM 2024.

anemia_severity.description: 贫血严重程度（铁代谢紊乱为主）

pain_level.description: 右上腹痛/肝包膜牵张痛（一阶滞后）
